title: Vercel — Build and deploy the best web experiences with the AI Cloud
description: Vercel gives developers the frameworks, workflows, and infrastructure to build a faster, more personalized web.

sections.title: Build and deploy on the AI Cloud.
sections.lede: Vercel gives developers the frameworks, workflows, and infrastructure to build a faster, more personalized web.

sections.text: Forge-static approximation of vercel.com authored from SSR-extractable headings + descriptions. Pixel-rep rotation target per PlausiDen-Forge #222. Not affiliated with Vercel; the substrate uses Vercel as a reference shape for the editorial_purity_gate's developer-platform audit.

sections.heading: Your product, delivered.
sections.lede: Five deploy surfaces, one platform — Vercel composes the same edge + build + CDN substrate under every workload type the team ships.

items.title: Agents
items.body: Run AI agents at the edge. Vercel's AI Cloud ships agent-first primitives: streaming inference, structured-output routing, and per-request isolation. Same edge runtime that powers the framework-aware deploys.

items.title: AI Apps
items.body: Ship AI-native applications. SDK + framework integration for chat, embeddings, agentic flows. Same provider-agnostic API regardless of which model lives behind it.

items.title: Web Apps
items.body: Framework-aware deploys. Next.js, Nuxt, SvelteKit, Astro — first-class CI/CD with preview deploys per branch, automatic edge caching, image optimization.

items.title: Commerce
items.body: Composable Commerce. Headless storefronts that compose Vercel's deployment substrate with the CMS + payment + search providers the operator chose. No vendor lock-in at the deploy layer.

items.title: Multi-tenant
items.body: Multi-tenant Platform. Per-tenant isolation at the build + runtime + edge layers. White-label deploys with tenant-scoped domains, secrets, analytics.

sections.body: Scale your infrastructure without compromising on developer experience. Deploy once, deliver everywhere.

sections.text: Deploy your first app in seconds.
git push to deploy. Preview URLs per branch. Production cut-overs are atomic per the version-on-the-wire substrate doctrine. No DNS step, no manual cache invalidation.

sections.title: Open the live Vercel site.
